briefdescription.para: This function reads a register from a specific device.

parameterdescription.para: the device to read from
the register to read

simplesect.para: This function is implemented as a macro for performance reasons

briefdescription.para: This function writes a register in a specific device.

parameterdescription.para: the device to write to
the register to write
the value to write

simplesect.para: This function is implemented as a macro for performance reasons

briefdescription.para: This function locks a device.

parameterdescription.para: the device to lock

briefdescription.para: This function initializes the hdcp port module.
This function reads a specific table entry within a device.

parameterdescription.para: the device to read from
the table to read
the row within the table to read
the value read

memberdef.argsstring: (tDevice *theDevice, KEYMGMT_tTableID theTableID, KEYMGMT_tRowID theRowID, uint64_t theU64Value)
memberdef.name: doTableWrite

briefdescription.para: This function writes a specific table entry within a device.

parameterdescription.para: the device to write to
the table to write
the row within the table to write
the value to write

briefdescription.para: This function enables a device.

parameterdescription.para: the device to enable

briefdescription.para: This function disables a device.

parameterdescription.para: the device to disable

briefdescription.para: This function probes a device.

parameterdescription.para: the device to probe
returns the number of tables
returns the number of rows per table

briefdescription.para: This function initializes the tables within a device.

parameterdescription.para: the device to whose tables are to be initialized

briefdescription.para: This function initializes a device.

parameterdescription.para: the device to initialize

briefdescription.para: This function initializes the module.
This function probes a device.

parameterdescription.para: the id of the device to probe

briefdescription.para: This function enables a device.

parameterdescription.para: the id of the device to enable

briefdescription.para: This function disables a device.

parameterdescription.para: the id of the device to disable

memberdef.argsstring: (KEYMGMT_tDevID theDevID, KEYMGMT_tTableID theTableID, const uint64_t *theBuf, int theBufSize)
memberdef.name: KEYMGMTDEV_Load

briefdescription.para: This function loads a buffer of data into a table.

parameterdescription.para: the id of the device being loaded
the id of the table to be loaded
the buffer of data to be loaded
the size of the buffer (in bytes)

memberdef.argsstring: (KEYMGMT_tDevID theDevID, KEYMGMT_tTableID theTableID, const uint64_t *theBuf, int theBufSize)
memberdef.name: KEYMGMTDEV_Verify

briefdescription.para: This function verifies the contents of a table against a buffer.

parameterdescription.para: the id of the device being queried
the id of the table to be verified
the buffer of data to be verified against
the size of the buffer (in bytes)

briefdescription.para: This function reads the version of the device core.

parameterdescription.para: the id of the device to query

simplesect.para: The version of the device core

briefdescription.para: This function implements the "keymgmt device disable" command.

parameterdescription.para: the number of arguments
an array of pointers to the arguments

briefdescription.para: This function implements the "keymgmt device enable" command.

parameterdescription.para: the number of arguments
an array of pointers to the arguments

briefdescription.para: This function implements the "keymgmt device read" command.

parameterdescription.para: the number of arguments
an array of pointers to the arguments

briefdescription.para: This function implements the "keymgmt device table" command.

parameterdescription.para: the number of arguments
an array of pointers to the arguments

briefdescription.para: This function implements the "keymgmt device write" command.

parameterdescription.para: the number of arguments
an array of pointers to the arguments

briefdescription.para: This function implements the "keymgmt device" debug command.

parameterdescription.para: the number of command line arguments
the list of the command line arguments

briefdescription.para: This file contains the implementation for the key management device module.
